name: actlint-monorepo
description: actlint — a static action-risk linter for MCP servers. Reads a server's advertised tools, derives an honest action-risk profile, compares it against what each tool declares, and reports the gaps. It never runs, routes, blocks, or executes anything.

scripts.guards: pnpm guard:purity && pnpm guard:sdk && pnpm guard:determinism && pnpm guard:vocabulary
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm guards
